typography.value: 16px/400/"Helvetica, Arial, FreeSans, Garuda, sans-serif", Helvetica, Arial, FreeSans, Garuda, sans-serif

animations.name: arrow-animation
text-animation

rules.cssText: #header-right-talk-btn, #header-right-menu-btn { position: relative; width: 3.2em; padding: 0px; transform: none; }
.header-menu-link:hover .header-menu-link-svg { transform: scale(1); transition: color 0.4s, transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.1, 1) 0.2s; }
.project-list { grid-template-columns: repeat(6, minmax(0px, 1fr)); grid-column: 1 / span 6; margin-top: 0px; }
#home-hero-title { grid-column: 1 / span 6; font-size: 6vw; margin-top: calc(var(--base-padding-y) + var(--header-size) * 2); }
#home-reel-cta:hover { color: var(--color-white); background: var(--color-blue); transition: background 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.35, 0, 0, 1) 0.3s; }
#home-featured-cta:hover { color: var(--color-white); background: var(--color-blue); transition: background 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.35, 0, 0, 1) 0.3s; }
#home-goal-title { grid-column: 1 / span 6; font-size: 10vw; width: inherit; margin-top: 0px; }
#home-goal-texts { position: relative; grid-column: 1 / span 6; margin-top: 3em; margin-bottom: 4em; font-size: 1.125em; }
#about-who { width: 100%; height: auto; padding-bottom: calc(var(--vh, 1vh) * 1125); font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 1vw, 1.75rem); }
.about-who-subsection { position: absolute; float: none; height: calc(var(--vh, 1vh) * 100); }
#about-who-title-main-scroll { right: 50%; line-height: calc(var(--base-padding-y) * 3 - .15em); transform: translate(50%); font-size: 4vw; }
#about-who-title-left { position: relative; bottom: auto; top: var(--base-padding-y); margin-top: 1em; }
#about-who-team-left { position: absolute; bottom: 0px; width: 100%; height: calc(100% - (100vw * 56 / 331) - var(--header-size) * 3.1 - var(--base-padding-y) - 1.5em); }

#about-who-team-left-mobile-tips { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; position: absolute; top: calc(50% - 3.175em); left: calc(50% - 3.175em); height: 6.25em; width: 6.25em; background: var(--color-blue); border-radius: 100%; font-size: 5vw; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.1, 0, 1); transform: scale3d(0, 0, 0); }
#about-who-team-right { width: 100%; flex-grow: inherit; max-width: none; height: calc(100% - var(--base-padding-y) - var(--header-size) - 2em); }
#about-clients-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; grid-column: 1 / span 6; }
#about-clients-title { font-size: 14vw; margin-top: 2em; height: inherit; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; row-gap: 0.1em; }
#about-clients-desc { text-align: center; margin: 4em auto auto; font-size: 1.2em; width: 20em; }
.award-category-talks .about-award-item-container:nth-child(3) { display: block; position: relative; flex-grow: 1; top: 0.5em; height: 0.75em; }
#about-capability-subheader { position: relative; grid-column: 1 / span 6; margin-top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; }
.about-capability-card { position: relative; width: calc(50% - var(--grid-gap) / 2); margin-left: 0px; font-size: 2.4vw; }
#header-center-project-back-btn { right: calc(var(--base-padding-x) + 4em); left: inherit; width: 3.2em; padding: 0px; justify-content: center; }
#project-details-meta { position: relative; top: 0px; width: 100%; padding-top: calc(var(--vh, 1vh) * 10); padding-bottom: 50px; transform: translateZ(0px); min-width: inherit; }
#project-details-side-list { position: static; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; width: 100%; }

#project-details-launch-cta-mobile:hover, #project-details-launch-cta:hover { color: var(--project-details-btn-text-hover); background: var(--project-details-highlight); transition: background 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.35, 0, 0, 1) 0.1s; }

#project-details-launch-cta-mobile:hover #project-details-launch-cta-text-mobile, #project-details-launch-cta:hover #project-details-launch-cta-text-mobile, #project-details-launch-cta-mobile:hover #project-details-launch-cta-text, #project-details-launch-cta:hover #project-details-launch-cta-text { transform: translate3d(-20%, 0px, 0px); transition: color 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.35, 0, 0, 1), transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.35, 0, 0, 1); }

#project-details-launch-cta-mobile:hover #project-details-launch-cta-arrow-mobile svg, #project-details-launch-cta:hover #project-details-launch-cta-arrow-mobile svg, #project-details-launch-cta-mobile:hover #project-details-launch-cta-arrow svg, #project-details-launch-cta:hover #project-details-launch-cta-arrow svg { color: var(--project-details-icon-color); }
#project-details-items-move-container { position: relative; padding-left: 0px; width: calc(100vw - var(--base-padding-x) * 2); height: auto; white-space: normal; }
#project-details-preview-title { position: relative; top: auto; transform: translateZ(0px); }
#project-details-preview-footer { position: relative; bottom: auto; margin-top: calc(var(--vh, vh) * 5); width: 100%; }
#end-section-subtitle { font-size: 1.2em; margin: auto; text-align: center; width: 55%; }
